quality_fixes.description: Add declare(strict_types=1) to all PHP files
Consolidate all enums under src/v1/Enum namespace
Add PHPStan level 5 static analysis to CI
Upgrade PHPStan to level 6 — add missing array type annotations
Upgrade PHPStan to level 9 — add @var annotation for PROPERTY_MAP constant
Add 5 optional Recipe properties (expires, hasPart, publication, ineligibleRegion, interactionStatistic)
Add hasMerchantReturnPolicy to Offer (per-product return policies)
Phase 0: Restructure PHP codebase under php/ prefix
Add QuantitativeValue.unitText, Dataset.hasPart/isPartOf, Organization ProfilePage fields + fix mixed-array serialization in JsonLdGenerator

google_rich_results_types.note: ALL 31 Google Search Gallery categories covered (26 original + 5 sub-categories: Merchant listing, Product variants, Loyalty program, Return policy, Shipping policy). Book actions excluded (DataFeed type, not Rich Results Test).

low_priority: VacationRental: Review.contentReferenceTime (French listings only, very niche)
remaining_audit_findings.note: Property gap audit complete (all 23 standalone types). Google property verification complete (all 26 types). QAPage Question/Answer comment gap dispatched #424.

type_classification.note: 89 schema classes - 12 enums - 4 building-block-only = 73 standalone-parity-testable. SeekToAction added as 4th building-block-only type (PR #362, always embedded in VideoObject.potentialAction). QC architecture maxes at 73 for parity. E2E denominator is ~28 standalone types.

phpstan_max_assessment.note: Level max achieved. Fixed 3 mixed-offset errors with local array accumulator in AddPropertiesToObject().

agent_sessions.title: Phase 1: TypeScript scaffold
Phase 2a: Port all 12 enums to TypeScript
Phase 2b: Port leaf sub-types batch 1 (9 types)
Phase 2c: Port leaf sub-types batch 2 (9 types)

Phase 3b: Port 9 Level-1 schema types
Phase 3c: Port 8 Level-2 schema types

Phase 3e: Port 9 schema types (Level 5-6)

Phase 4b: npm publish workflow
agent_sessions.note: Workflow file — Eva must merge. NPM_TOKEN secret also needed.

agent_sessions.title: Port QAPage + Restaurant to TypeScript (audit #37 fix)
Add build-artifact smoke test (verify-build script)
agent_sessions.note: Per audit #39. Validates npm pack tarball: ESM + CJS imports + JSON-LD output.

agent_sessions.title: Refactor TS constructors to options-object pattern (batch 1: A-D)
Refactor TS constructors to options-object pattern (batch 2: E-M)
Refactor TS constructors to options-object pattern (batch 3: O-V)
Fix 5 PHPStan level max errors in JsonLdGenerator.php
Add JobPosting beta properties (PHP + TS)
Add Review.positiveNotes and Review.negativeNotes (PHP + TS)
Add SeekToAction and VideoObject.potentialAction (PHP + TS)
Add missing recommended properties (QuantitativeValue.unitText, Dataset.hasPart/isPartOf, Org ProfilePage fields) + fix mixed-array serialization
agent_sessions.note: Revision required for mixed-array serialization bug in JsonLdGenerator. Fixed per-element type dispatch.

agent_sessions.title: Add AggregateRating.itemReviewed (PHP + TS)
Comprehensive quality sweep: QAPage properties + edge-case tests + README
agent_sessions.note: First high-complexity dispatch per Eva #372. Part 1 (Question/Answer image+video) and Part 3 (README) delivered. Part 2 (test expansion) underdelivered — only 2 types covered with data-provider padding. Follow-up needed for genuine edge-case test expansion.

agent_sessions.title: Cross-language parity verification tool
agent_sessions.note: First auditing tool dispatch per Eva #372. Created tools/parity-check.ts. Known limitation: TS extends interface regex doesn't handle FoodEstablishmentOptions extends LocalBusinessOptions. Affects 1/88 classes.

agent_sessions.title: Rewrite parity-check tool to use AST parsing instead of regex
agent_sessions.note: Rewrites tools/parity-check.ts to use TypeScript Compiler API + php-parser (glayzzle). Fixes FoodEstablishmentOptions extends bug. Per Eva directive: AST over regex.

agent_sessions.title: Add TypeScript examples to all README usage sections
agent_sessions.note: README has 34 PHP examples but only 1 TS example. 6 examples had missing required constructor properties. Fixed in revision. Merged cycle 112.

agent_sessions.title: Expand edge-case test coverage for 10 standalone schema types (PHP + TS)
agent_sessions.note: 52 new tests across 10 types in both PHP and TS. Minor overlaps with existing tests but genuine edge cases. Merged cycle 112.

agent_sessions.title: Convert WebPageElement to options-object constructor pattern
agent_sessions.note: Last remaining positional-param TS class. Missed during cycle 104 refactoring. 6 files updated, CI green on all 9 checks.

agent_sessions.title: Upgrade PHPStan to level max: fix 3 mixed-offset errors in JsonLdGenerator
agent_sessions.note: Fixed mixed-offset access with local array accumulator. PHPStan config upgraded 9->max. CI green on all 7 checks.

agent_sessions.title: Expand TS JsonLdGenerator test coverage to match PHP edge cases
agent_sessions.note: 8 new edge-case tests: special chars, deep nesting, array @type, schemasToJson, schemaToObject API, mixed scalars, array preservation, propertyMap regression. TS JsonLdGenerator tests: 7→15.

agent_sessions.title: Add Question.comment and Answer.comment properties (PHP + TS)
agent_sessions.note: Google property verification found Question.comment and Answer.comment missing (recommended by Google for QAPage). Adding Comment[] property to both classes in PHP and TS.

agent_sessions.title: Build metric-snapshot Rust tool for automated state.json verification
agent_sessions.note: First Rust tool build via Copilot. metric-snapshot automates step 5.11 metric verification. On first run, caught stale core_modules count (2→3).

agent_sessions.title: Audit all 89 TypeScript schema classes for consistency
agent_sessions.note: First code quality audit dispatch. Found 6 inherited TS classes missing *Options interfaces. Added BlogPostingOptions, NewsArticleOptions, MobileApplicationOptions, WebApplicationOptions, RestaurantOptions, StoreOptions.

agent_sessions.title: Build cycle-status Rust tool: consolidated startup checklist report
agent_sessions.note: Phase 1 of Eva's Rust tool pipeline directive (#436). Consolidates 6+ gh api calls from startup checklist steps 1, 1.1, 3, 4, 5, 8 into a single tool. Revision round fixed URL encoding, per_page, API URLs. Runtime tested with API access (#440).

agent_sessions.title: Create state-schema shared Rust crate and version state.json
agent_sessions.note: State.json schema versioning per Eva #441. Creates shared state-schema crate, adds schema_version:1, refactors metric-snapshot and check-field-inventory to use shared types.

agent_sessions.title: Extend metric-snapshot with test counts, staleness detection, and schema version validation
agent_sessions.note: Phase 2 of tool pipeline. Test count, field staleness, schema version validation. KNOWN ISSUE: test counting doesn't account for data providers (counts methods not executions). Fix dispatched #450.

agent_sessions.title: Fix metric-snapshot test counting to handle data providers
agent_sessions.note: Fix for Phase 2: data providers (PHP @dataProvider, TS it.each) cause test method count to be lower than test execution count. All 13 metric-snapshot checks now pass.

agent_sessions.title: Build housekeeping-scan Rust tool
agent_sessions.note: Phase 3 of tool pipeline. Detects stale agent issues, orphan draft PRs, dead branches, stale audit/qc-inbound issues. Revision: AGENT_PR_AUTHOR bug, git cwd, wrapper pattern.

agent_sessions.title: Build pipeline-check Rust tool (Phase 4)
agent_sessions.note: Phase 4 of tool pipeline. Unified orchestrator that runs metric-snapshot, check-field-inventory, housekeeping-scan, and cycle-status in sequence with aggregated report. Runtime tested: all 4 steps pass, both JSON and human-readable output working.

qc_status.request_165: COMPLETE. QC issue #41 closed. 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 158 warnings. @graph API also validated.
qc_status.report_57: ALL FIXES MERGED AND VALIDATED. PRs #198, #199. QC-63 confirmed: 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 19 warnings.
qc_status.request_200: COMPLETE. QC-63 validated. 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 19 warnings (down from 58, 67% reduction). Issues #195 and #200 closed.
qc_status.report_72: FIXED. PR #214 merged. Added 5 optional Recipe properties (expires, hasPart, publication, ineligibleRegion, interactionStatistic). QC request #215 sent.
qc_status.request_215: COMPLETE. QC repo #74 closed. QC PR #76 merged (10:16 UTC). 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors. All 5 Recipe optional properties validated. Issue #215 closed.
qc_status.request_234: COMPLETE. QC repo #84 closed. 188 QC unit tests, 39/39 E2E pass, 0 errors, 15 warnings (all known false positives). Offer.hasMerchantReturnPolicy validated. Issue #234 closed.
qc_status.request_331: PARITY COMPLETE. QC-ACK #138. Parity: 73/73 standalone types (100%). 0 E2E errors, 25 warnings (false positives). Class inventory: 88/88 PHP=TS. Per audit #73, 73 is the maximum achievable (3 building-block types validated through parents). Publish gate satisfied.
qc_status.request_265: COMPLETE. QC repo #114 closed. 188 tests, 1133 assertions, ALL PASS. 39/39 E2E, 0 errors, 15 warnings (known false positives). Phase 0 gate cleared.
qc_status.request_299: COMPLETE. QC-ACK #122 closed (2026-03-01T16:37Z). 23/23 parity match, 0 E2E errors, 14 warnings (known false positives). All DoD criteria satisfied: top-level parity, propertyMap, inheritance chains, Adobe E2E. Issue #299 closed.

blockers.description: Phase 4c: npm publish requires Eva to create a GitHub Release (triggers publish-npm.yml workflow)
blockers.qc_validation: SATISFIED. 73/73 standalone parity (100%). Per audit #73, 73 is the correct denominator (88 - 12 enums - 3 building-block-only = 73).
blockers.publish_workflow: publish-npm.yml pushed by Eva (commit f59a531). Uses OIDC provenance, no NPM_TOKEN needed.
blockers.pr_305_status: CLOSED. Confirmed superseded by Eva (2026-03-03T20:04Z). Branch deleted.
blockers.verify_build_ci: ADDED. Eva applied workflow change (commit 1b8ff8f, 2026-03-04T00:43Z). verify-build runs in ci-ts.yml on every push/PR. #403 closed.
remaining_actions: Pipeline proves reliable over 3-5 cycles (reliability clock started cycle 134, now at cycle 4)
Eva configures npm trusted publishing (OIDC link)
Eva creates GitHub Release to trigger publish
blockers.pre_publish_checkpoint: Active (per Eva #401, #436, audit #75): Multi-party sign-off required. Main + QC + audit must all confirm. Eva #436 adds requirement: automated tool pipeline must produce reliable end-to-end verification report before publish.

typescript_plan.qc_validation_strategy: Aligned. QC repo #98: ts-consumer/ dir, parity testing, begins after Phase 1 merge

preparatory_artifacts.ts_implementation_skill: Created cycle 71, updated cycle 72 (Pattern A/B per audit #20)

audit_enhancements.build_artifact_validation: COMPLETE (audit #39). PR #317 merged 22:43Z. verify-build script validates ESM+CJS+JSON-LD from packed tarball. Audit-inbound #315 closed.
audit_enhancements.post_publish_transition: Accepted (audit #44). STARTUP_CHECKLIST steps 5.7 (one-time transition) and 5.8 (dual-language consistency) added. Version coordination deferred to transition execution. Audit-inbound #322.

copilot_metrics.note: 50 dispatches, 46 merged, 1 closed without merge (#467/PR #468). 2 in-flight (#483 regression tests, #485 review agent). 4 revision rounds total. 97.9% merge rate.

last_cycle.summary: Cycle 143: Consumed cycle 142 review (score 2/5, PR #481 merged). Fixed field_inventory freshness drift (14 markers). Added freshness reconciliation to COMPLETION_CHECKLIST. Dispatched #483 (regression tests) and #485 (review agent). 10 consecutive clean pipeline cycles.

total_testable_types_note: 89 schema classes - 12 enums = 77 testable. Of those, 73 can be parity-tested standalone; 4 are building-block-only types validated through parent types (including SeekToAction added in PR #362). Per audits #62, #68, #73. Publish gate uses 73 (standalone-parity-testable).

phases.name: cycle-status tool
phases.description: Consolidate steps 1, 1.1, 3, 4, 5, 8 into single report. Merged after revision round. Runtime tested successfully.

phases.name: verify-metrics tool
phases.description: Extend metric-snapshot with test count verification, field inventory staleness detection, schema version validation. Data provider fix merged: all 13 checks pass.

phases.name: housekeeping-scan tool
phases.description: Stale issues, orphan PRs, dead branches, audit-inbound lifecycle. Revision round fixed AGENT_PR_AUTHOR bug.

phases.name: pipeline orchestrator
phases.description: Top-level tool that runs all above in sequence, tracks step completion, produces unified report. Runtime verified: all 4 steps pass.

tool_pipeline.publish_gate: All phases complete. Reliability clock: cycle 10 (started 134). Minimum 3 cycles reached at cycle 136. 10 consecutive clean cycles as of cycle 143.

review_agent.description: Programmatic tracking of review agent findings for trend detection. Per audit #102.

field_inventory.description: Self-describing inventory of mutable state.json fields with expected refresh cadence. During metric verification (step 5.11), any field not refreshed within its cadence should be flagged and corrected. This inverts the verification pattern from 'enumerate what to check' to 'flag what hasn't been checked.' Per audit #80.

typescript_stats.cadence: every merge that adds/removes TS files

total_testable_types.cadence: after schema class or enum additions

qc_requests_pending.cadence: after QC request creation or completion

schema_status.google_rich_results_types.cadence: after Google gallery changes or new implementations

schema_status.phpstan_max_assessment.cadence: after PHPStan config or fix changes

review_agent.cadence: every cycle (updated when consuming review findings)
